# sdwan_tenant_feature_template (Data Source)

This data source can read the tenant feature template.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sdwan_tenant_feature_template" "example" {
  id = "f6b2c44c-693c-4763-b010-895aa3d236bd"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The id of the feature template
- `name` (String) The name of the feature template

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the feature template
- `device_types` (Set of String) List of supported device types
- `template_type` (String) The template type
- `tenant_organization_name` (Attributes List) Onboards the tenant on the device (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tenant_organization_name))
- `version` (Number) The version of the feature template

<a id="nestedatt--tenant_organization_name"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tenant_organization_name`

Read-Only:

- `maximum_vpns_allowed` (Number) Maximum VPNs allowed
- `optional` (Boolean) Indicates if list item is considered optional.
- `organization_name` (String) Organization Name
- `organization_name_variable` (String) Variable name
- `tier_name` (String) Tier name
